      Past year

      The seller responded to my messages and the item was as described and packaged good and the price was good as well.       Past month
      Verified purchase
      The NF parka was securely wrapped, is in excellent condition, is a great value, and is exactly as described. Shipping was free, which is greatly appreciated, but was delayed perhaps due to the recent weather events---not the seller's fault. Overall, my experience with this seller was great.

      Lighting fast shipping!! ⚡️📬 Great packaging 👏 Item’s arrived in condition and appearance was exactly as described. 👍 High Quality Exercise Gear!!! There was good communication.       I received an Under Armour shirt that unfortunately had a defect. I contacted the seller and he communicated that he would replace the shirt. I received my replacement shirt today and am very pleased to have such a positive experience. Great seller!

    • a***e (21)- Feedback left by buyer.
      Past 6 months
      Verified purchase
      I ordered the wrong size sweatshirt. I paid $17.63 to send it back via UPS. I received a notice of delivery from UPS. This seller has the money I paid for the sweatshirt as well as the item itself and refuses to contact me about getting a refund or replacement with the right size item. I am disgusted with this store and will never buy anything from Ebay again.
      Mens Nike Gym Athletic Club Hoodie Hooded Sweatshirt Pullover New (#394934675870)
